channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Election integrity groups press Supreme Court to require ballots by Election Day
item.description: Election integrity groups urge Supreme Court to ban counting mail-in ballots arriving after Election Day, potentially affecting laws in 14 states and ...

item.title: Navarro Signals Trump May Force Big Tech to Pay Full AI Energy Costs
Trump hammers AOC Munich stumbles as 'not a good look for the United States'
item.description: Trump criticized Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's Munich Security Conference performance, calling it "not a good look for the United States" on foreign...

item.title: Trump task force racks up 500 arrests in January as president brands cartels âISIS of the Western Hemisphereâ
item.description: Trump's Homeland Security Task Force reportedly arrested over 500 people in January surge targeting cartels, gangs, and smuggling rings across the nat...

item.title: Texas early voting begins ahead of contentious March 3 primary elections
item.description: Texas primary voters may begin early voting Tuesday for the March 3 primary elections, though the races could advance to a runoff if no candidate secu...

item.title: Trump Mocks Hillaryâs Meltdown in Munich, Points Out Democrats' Epstein Charade Has Backfired on Them
Morning Minute: Barking Up the Wrong Tree
AOC Gets Big Mad at Press Coverage of Her Munich Disaster, and She's Never Been More Exposed
Trump withholds endorsement in fiery GOP Senate primary as early voting begins in Texas
item.description: Trump remains undecided on the Texas Senate primary as Cornyn faces MAGA challengers Paxton and Hunt in a competitive Republican race ahead of March 3...

item.title: Trump Withholds Endorsement As Texas GOP Senate Primary Early Voting Begins
